option.name: originalContent
option.value:
name: calculator description: A functional mobile grade calculator with themes. publish_to: 'none'
version: 1.0.0+1
environment: sdk: '>=3.0.0 <4.0.0'
dependencies: flutter: sdk: flutter archive: ^3.4.0 xml: ^6.3.0 file_picker: ^6.1.1 excel: ^2.1.0 path_provider: ^2.1.2 provider: ^6.0.0
dev_dependencies: flutter_test: sdk: flutter flutter_lints: ^2.0.0
flutter: uses-material-design: true

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
name: calculator description: A functional mobile grade calculator with themes. publish_to: 'none'
version: 1.0.0+1
environment: sdk: '>=3.0.0 <4.0.0'
dependencies: flutter: sdk: flutter archive: ^3.4.0 xml: ^6.3.0 file_picker: ^6.1.1 excel: ^2.1.0 path_provider: ^2.1.2 provider: ^6.0.0
dev_dependencies: flutter_test: sdk: flutter flutter_lints: ^2.0.0
flutter: uses-material-design: true
